step_rationale: Neutrophil protease activating coagulation and platelets; endothelial erosion.
mechanism: Cathepsin G amplifies platelet recruitment and thrombin generation via ADP release and coagulation cascade activation.

references.title: Neutrophil Cathepsin G Enhances Thrombogenicity of Mildly Injured Arteries via ADP-Mediated Platelet Sensitization.
Desquamation of human coronary artery endothelium by human mast cell proteases: implications for plaque erosion.
